underlying_goal: Create new Claude Code skills for integrating Gemini and Codex as collaborative sub-agents, with file-based output architecture
friction_detail: Codex review output was truncated/lost due to stderr suppression and stdout size limits, requiring multiple retries and architecture redesign to file-based output.
brief_summary: User wanted to create gemini-collab and codex-collab skills as dual AI sub-agents in Claude Code; both were created, tested, iteratively improved with file-based output, and pushed to git.
